subject: mobilenetv2-1.0-imagenet-agx3-performance-estimator-200mbps

config.estimator_invocation: source scripts/env.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 && dla_compiler --fanalyze-performance --march models/arch/AGX3_Performance.arch --network-file models/ir/mobilenetv2-1.0-imagenet/int8/mobilenetv2-1.0-imagenet.xml --foutput-format open_vino_hetero --fplugin HETERO:FPGA --o out.aot --dumpdir models/compiled/_ph0_scratch/mobilenetv2-1.0-imagenet_74n_5u_q --overwrite-output-files --fdump-performance-report perf.txt --fassumed-memory-bandwidth 200

notes: FPGA AI Suite performance-estimator (HETERO:FPGA) output for mobilenetv2-1.0-imagenet (int8). Memory-bandwidth bottleneck reported: throughput was scaled down from the compute-only rate to match the assumed external memory bandwidth. DDR filter (weight) reads per inference: 12.860 MB vs 3.449 MB of on-disk INT8 weights -> 3.73x re-read factor. Weights are being streamed from external memory on every inference, not folded into on-chip M20K -- this arch is not a DDR-free/MIF-resident configuration regardless of model size. Activation-spill traffic (DDR feature reads + writes) per inference: 13.350 + 10.960 = 24.310 MB -- refines PLAN §5's flat 2.5 MB spill constant (above it by 21.81 MB).
